nasb.text: He did right in the sight of the Lord and walked in all the way of his father David, nor did he turn aside to the right or to the left.

esv.text: And he did what was right in the eyes of the Lord and walked in all the way of David his father, and he did not turn aside to the right or to the left.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為正的事，跟隨他祖宗大衛所行的一切道路，不偏左右。

ccb.text: 约西亚做耶和华视为正的事，事事效法他祖先大卫，不偏不离。
